title: Why Can't You Taste Food Without Smell?

scenes.text: You actually taste food with your nose, not just your mouth!
About 80% of what you think is taste is actually your sense of smell.
When you hold your nose, flavors become dull and bland.
Smell and taste work together to shape your dining experience.
scenes.label: SENSES COMBINE!

scenes.text: Follow for a mind-blowing fact every day.

description: Did you know you taste food more with your nose than your mouth? Discover how our senses work together! Follow for daily facts!
